---
type: React Component
icon: fe-component.svg
title: Category Link.Generated
description: CategoryLink is a shared UI component in the marketing web app template, used to render links that point to product or content categories, giving shoppers a consistent, reusable way to navigate into category pages from wherever it's placed.
level: component
owner: contentful/team-workflows
ddd_subdomain: supporting
ddd_role: Generated Link Component
---

As a generated shared-ui component, it's designed to be dropped into other parts of the interface—navigation menus, category grids, or promotional sections—rather than tied to a single page, keeping category linking behavior consistent across the app.
